creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
This is a completely new port framework.  Since v7.0, the Condor build system and dependencies have changed significantly.  I left the original port Makefile header intact, but the rest of the port is rewritten from scratch.  I contacted the maintainer of the old port some time ago and he stated that he is no longer interested in maintaining the port.  The email address in the Makefile is no longer valid.  I can provide the new address if needed.

Fix: 

Shar file is too large for attachment.  Download here:

http://www.acadix.biz/Ports/distfiles/condor-shar.txt
